# Abdelghani Moussaid

## Professional Overview
- **Role**: Software Engineer
- **Company**: Dedalus Group
- **Experience**: Full-stack engineer with 5 years of experience building reliable software for healthcare and industrial sectors
- **Core Focus**: The intersection of stable enterprise architecture and extreme performance optimization
- **Enterprise Reliability**: Extensive experience in mission-critical domains, from e-prescription modules in healthcare to centralizing industrial ERP workflows
- **Performance Engineering**: Passionate about squeezing maximum efficiency out of .NET, specializing in zero-allocation code and Native AOT to reduce infrastructure costs
- **Full-Stack Delivery**: Proficient in managing the entire software lifecycle, from SQL Server database tuning to building responsive Angular front-ends

## Open Source Projects & Contributions
- **Project**: AOTel
  - **URL**: https://github.com/aotel/aotel/
  - **Description**: Open-source, zero-allocation OTLP edge ingestion proxy designed for extreme performance using .NET 10 Native AOT
- **Project**: ZatcaOracle v2.0
  - **URL**: https://github.com/abdelghani-moussaid/zatca-phase-2-agent-integration
  - **Description**: High-efficiency .NET 10 microservice optimized for e-invoicing compliance with minimal CPU and memory overhead
- **Contribution**: Microsoft testfx (PR #8238)
  - **URL**: https://github.com/microsoft/testfx/pull/8238
  - **Description**: Core contributor to Microsoft's testing framework, optimizing performance by eliminating LINQ closure allocations
